name: Taco Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Large Can Ranch Style Beans, drained
3 Medium Tomatoes, cut into bite-sized pieces
recipeInstructions:
1 Drain beans and corn.
2 Shred lettuce.
3 Slice tomatoes into bite-sized pieces.
4 Chop onions.
5 Grate cheese and chill the first six items.
6 Just before serving, add crumbled corn chips and top with 1 bottle of Catalina dressing.
